lines: Jy'uba maso, wowe muntu wizeye :Mu gitondo, jya wisung’ Imana, Kuk' Umwanzi yoshy' abataba maso Ngw abagushe kukw abanga.
Jy'uba maso : wicogora  Jy'uba maso : senga
Jy'uba maso, no ku manyva y'ihangu, Iby'isi byibagij' iby'ijuru; Weho, gir'
umwanya wo kwiherera, Ng’ useng' Umukiza wawe.
Jy'uba maso n'imunsi na n'ijoro, Wibuk' ibyiza by'inshuti Yesu; Ujy'umushakish'
Jy'uba maso, hose mu gihe cyose : Satan' akubikiriye hose, Ashak' uburyo
